channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Google Sets 2029 Deadline for Quantum-Safe Cryptography
item.description: The post-quantum future may be coming sooner than you think, as Google plans to have PQC migration in place by 2029....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Delaware Supreme Court Reverses, Holds Cyber Insurers Sufficiently Pled Collective Subrogation Claim Resulting from Blackbaud Data Breach
item.description: The fallout from the massive Blackbaud breach is not over, it seems. Lydia Mills of Wiley Rein writes: Reversing the decision below, the Delaware Supreme Court held that a group of cyber liability ins...

item.title: AI-Native Security Is a Must to Counter AI-Based Attacks

item.title: TeamPCP Hits Trivy, Checkmarx, and LiteLLM in Credential Theft Campaign

item.title: Companies face difficult choices in blaming hackers for an attack
item.description: Eric Geller reports: Businesses need to think carefully about when they publicly blame a threat actor for a cyberattack, lest they invite unwanted consequences, experts said at a panel at the RSAC 202...

item.title: Utimaco Survey Finds 78% of US Companies Name Legacy Data Breaches the Top Gen AI Risk

item.title: Malware on Luxembourg public sector devices was active for almost a month
